transcript.content: We are evaluating three vendors for our ERP needs. What differentiates you?
Our ERP has native AI features and pre-built integrations with 200+ tools. Competitors charge extra for these.
Interesting. But your pricing is 30% higher. Can you justify?
The AI features alone save 15 hours per employee monthly. ROI is clear at our price point.
We will build a comparison matrix and get back to you.
